frontendTests.name: DOM Elements Check
steps: Verify all elements exist: top-errors-body, alerts-list, kpi-*
frontendTests.expected: All elements present, no JS errors

frontendTests.name: API Calls Test
frontendTests.expected: All API calls return 200 status with valid JSON

frontendTests.name: Data Display Test
steps: Check top errors table shows data
Verify alerts list shows recent alerts
frontendTests.expected: All data displays correctly with proper formatting

frontendTests.name: SSE Connection Test
steps: Generate new alert to test real-time updates
frontendTests.expected: SSE connects successfully, receives heartbeats and alerts

frontendTests.name: Interactive Features Test
steps: Verify modal opens with error details
frontendTests.expected: All interactions work, modals open, actions complete

backendTests.name: API Endpoints Test
backendTests.expected: All endpoints return valid JSON data

backendTests.name: Alert Engine Test
backendTests.expected: Alert engine active, rules evaluate correctly

integrationTests.name: End-to-End Alert Flow
integrationTests.description: Generate log → Alert rule triggers → Alert created → SSE broadcast → Frontend displays

integrationTests.name: User Permission Flow
integrationTests.description: Different users see appropriate data based on permissions

integrationTests.name: Real-time Updates
integrationTests.description: New alerts appear in dashboard without refresh

solutions: Check browser console for JavaScript errors
Ensure user has permissions to see errors
Check alerts table has recent entries
Test SSE connection in browser console
Verify alert engine is evaluating rules
Check alert rules are active and properly configured
Check browser network tab for SSE connection
Verify EventSource is not blocked by CORS
Check server logs for connection errors

troubleshooting.issue: KPIs showing zero or incorrect values
solutions: Verify database queries return correct counts
Check user scope filtering is working
